title: Legopitstop Mods
description: All Legopitstop's Fabric mods packed into one modpack.
body:
All Legopitstop's Fabric Mods in one modpack.

## Legopitstop Mods
- Armor Stand Poses
- Basalt Blocks
- Bright
- Canned
- Lightning Bolt Glass
- Lot's More Food
- More Blocks
- More Gold
- More Pumpkins
- Simple Magnets

[![Sponsor](https://legopitstop.weebly.com/files/theme/banner_5.webp)](https://www.bisecthosting.com/legopitstop)
Click on the above image, select your plan (at least 4GB), use code `legopitstop` to get 25% off your first month, and enjoy playing with your friends!


## Misc Mods
- Fabric API (dependency)
- Freecam
- Iris Shaders
- Just Enough Items (JEI)
- Mod Menu
- Sodium
- Sodium Extra
